changes.description: ISQ OpenInfra Feb 2026 NAV $32.40/share (Class F-I), AUM $207.0M. Series II Transactional NAV $207,006K / 6,389,136 shares. Source: SEC 8-K EX-99.1 filed 2026-04-02 (CIK 2059924, Acc# 0001213900-26-039308).
ISQ OpenInfra declared special cash distribution on Mar 31, 2026: $0.3399/share for Series II F-I, F-S, F-J, E share classes. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-04-02.
KKR Infrastructure declared distributions payable Mar 31, 2026: Class I $0.3300/share. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-04-01.

Ares ACI April 2026 closing: $305.2M aggregate share sales. As of Mar 31, 2026: 119.1M Class I + 6.5M Class S + 16.7K Class D shares outstanding. March NAV expected ~20 business days after Apr 1. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-04-07.
